prestazioni: AMR-developed 4.0L twin-turbo V8 (engine code: TM02) with forged internals, upgraded Mahle Motorsport pistons (9.5:1 compression), and Carrillo H-beam connecting rods for 1,000+ hp capability on E85 fuel. Pair with a Garrett GTX5544R Gen II turbocharger (84mm compressor wheel, .96 A/R turbine housing) and a custom AMR titanium 4.5-inch exhaust system with secondary catalytic converters removed and replaced with straight-pipe sections for optimized spool and top-end flow.

Full Ohlins TTX46 MkII coilover suspension with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and high-speed compression), custom valving for the Valhalla’s carbon tub, and spherical bearing top mounts from AST Suspension. Front and rear anti-roll bars upgraded to TracTive Dynamics adjustable units with 3-position stiffness settings (25mm, 28mm, 32mm front; 22mm, 25mm, 28mm rear).

AP Racing 6-piston front (410mm discs) and 4-piston rear (380mm discs) carbon-ceramic brake kit with bespoke caliper cooling ducts integrated into the Valhalla’s front splitter. Brake pads upgraded to Ferodo DS3000 compound for track use, paired with Goodridge 900-series braided stainless steel brake lines and Castrol SRF brake fluid for consistent pedal feel under extreme heat.
estetica: RML Group-designed carbon fiber widebody kit with extended front fenders (30mm per side), rear quarter panels (40mm per side), and a revised rear diffuser with integrated Gurney flaps for increased downforce. Kit includes custom carbon fiber side skirts with air curtains to reduce front-end lift and a revised front splitter with adjustable dive planes (3 positions: +5°, 0°, -5°).

Aston Martin Racing (AMR) carbon fiber GT3-style rear wing with dual-element design, adjustable angle of attack (0° to +18°), and integrated DRS (Drag Reduction System) for high-speed stability. Wing mounts to the Valhalla’s existing carbon tub via titanium hardware and includes a removable T-slot endplate for track-day adjustments.

Full interior overhaul with a Sparco Pro 2000 carbon fiber racing seat (FIA 8862-2009 certified) mounted on a custom AMR seat bracket system, paired with a Schroth Profi II 6-point harness. Steering wheel replaced with a MOMO Mod.70 carbon fiber unit featuring integrated AIM MXS Strada data display and paddle shifters for the ZF 8HP95 transmission. Alcantara-wrapped dashboard and door cards with exposed carbon fiber weave for weight reduction.
